videos.headline: Parker Kingston runs in BYU's first TD
videos.description: Parker Kingston punches in a BYU touchdown after an interception puts them in prime position.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Parker Kingston runs in BYU's first TD) 2025/10/04 ESHEET

videos.headline: Parker Kingston breaks free for 54-yard BYU TD
videos.description: Parker Kingston takes it to the house again, delivering his second score of the game for BYU.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Parker Kingston breaks free for 54-yard BYU TD) 2025/10/04 ESHEET

videos.headline: Therrian Alexander III almost takes INT to the house for BYU
videos.description: Therrian Alexander III nearly goes the distance, returning the interception to the 1-yard line to set BYU up for a score.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Therrian Alexander III almost takes INT to the house for BYU) 2025/10/04 ESHEET
NCF_One-Play (Kade Hensley kicks 45-yard field goal) 2025/10/04 ESHEET

videos.headline: BYU's Bachmeier intercepted for first time this season
videos.description: West Virginia's Chase Wilson picks off BYU quarterback Bear Bachmeier.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (BYU's Bachmeier intercepted for first time this season) 2025/10/04 ESHEET

videos.headline: Chase Roberts turns on jets for 85-yard grab to set up a BYU TD
videos.description: Chase Roberts beats West Virginia for an 85-yard catch-and-run to set up a BYU touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Chase Roberts turns on jets for 85-yard grab to set up a BYU TD) 2025/10/04 ESHEET

videos.headline: Touchdown! LJ Martin scores vs. West Virginia
videos.description: End Zone! LJ Martin scores 4-yard rushing touchdown

videos.headline: Diore Hubbard powers in for West Virginia’s 1st TD
videos.description: Diore Hubbard caps off the drive with a strong run to bring West Virginia closer.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Diore Hubbard powers in for West Virginia’s 1st TD) 2025/10/04 ESHEET

videos.headline: Bear Bachmeier strolls in for another BYU TD
videos.description: Bear Bachmeier walks in untouched to extend BYU's lead.
